data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Apple’s website leverages robust cloud infrastructure to ensure high availability and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes content delivery networks (CDNs) and cloud services for load balancing and fault tolerance.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decoupled components for enhanced flexibility and faster deployment cycles.
data.technical_spec: Employs a microservices approach to isolate different features for independent scaling and updates.

data.title: Responsive Design Framework
data.description: Responsive web design to ensure compatibility across devices.
data.technical_spec: Built with CSS frameworks like Bootstrap for adaptable layouts and media queries.

data.title: Server-side Rendering
data.description: Ensures improved SEO and faster load times by rendering pages on the server.
data.technical_spec: Node.js and other SSR technologies to pre-render pages before sending to the client.

data.title: API Integration Layer
data.description: Facilitates seamless interaction with various backend services through APIs.
data.technical_spec: REST and GraphQL APIs to manage data flow between frontend and backend.
